title: Cochlidiosperma sibthorpioides
taxonomy: Cochlidiosperma sibthorpioides is classified as a genus within the family Boraginaceae. The Boraginaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. Boraginaceae includes over 2,000 species of plants, many of which are native to the Northern Hemisphere. Cochlidiosperma sibthorpioides is a rare and endemic species found in certain regions. It is a member of the subfamily Boraginoideae, which includes many species of borage and forget-me-not plants.
